projects.title: Nexus C.A. — ERP Digital Transformation
projects.shortDescription: End-to-end ERP solution solving 'islands of information' for a real-world distributor. Built with a decoupled React/TypeScript architecture.
projects.fullDescription: Nexus C.A. represents a strategic digital transformation for a distribution company, replacing fragmented processes with a unified Enterprise Resource Planning system. The project features a decoupled architecture using high-performance React patterns, custom hooks for business logic, and a strategic dashboard for real-time decision making. Implemented comprehensive modules for Finance, HR, and Operations, ensuring data consistency across the entire organization through advanced state management and TypeScript safety.
features: Unified strategic dashboard eliminating data fragmentation
Finance module: Automated budget tracking and fiscal reporting
HR module: Centralized employee lifecycle and payroll management
Operations module: Optimized logistics and inventory tracking
Granular Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for corporate security
Decoupled Container/Presentation architecture for scalability
Complex data validation layers with React Hook Form
High-performance data visualization for executive KPIs

projects.title: Bodega Provisions — Logistics Automation
projects.shortDescription: Operational automation platform for a premium concierge service in Aruba. Streamlining high-end supply chain and client delivery.
projects.fullDescription: Bodega Provisions is a custom-built operational hub designed to automate the logistics of a premium concierge and grocery service in Aruba. The system optimizes the entire workflow from client intake to final delivery, featuring bilingual support and highly efficient order management. By transitioning from manual coordination to this automated platform, the service significantly reduced overhead while maintaining the high standards of a luxury concierge experience.
features: Automated logistics workflow for high-end concierge services
Bilingual customer experience (English/Spanish)
Optimized delivery routing and inventory synchronization
Strategic client management and preference tracking
Desktop application distribution for operational stability
Secure data handling for premium client profiles

projects.title: Interactive Financial Analysis Engine
projects.shortDescription: Advanced Engineering Economics tool for dynamic cash flow visualization, amortization, and financial decision making.
projects.fullDescription: Developed as a specialized tool for Engineering Economics, this application provides a sophisticated engine for analyzing complex financial scenarios. It enables users to visualize dynamic cash flows, calculate multiple amortization schedules, and run sensitivity analyses for capital investments. The project focuses on data accuracy and intuitive visual feedback to support critical financial decision-making processes in engineering contexts.
features: Dynamic cash flow visualization with interactive charts
Complex amortization schedule generator (multiple systems)
Net Present Value (NPV) and IRR calculation engine
Real-time parameter adjustment with instant result feedback
Exportable financial reports for project planning
Mathematical precision for Engineering Economics standards

projects.title: Maze Hunter — OOP Architecture Study
projects.shortDescription: Complex maze-solving engine in Java with fog-of-war, full statistics system and JSON persistence.
projects.fullDescription: Maze Hunter is a deep dive into Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) and SOLID principles using Java. The application features procedurally generated mazes, a sophisticated fog-of-war mechanic, and a complete persistence layer using GSON for JSON serialization. It serves as a robust example of clean code practices, modular design, and efficient algorithm implementation in a desktop environment, later ported to the web via TeaVM.
features: Procedurally generated environments with scaled complexity
Strict adherence to SOLID principles and OOP patterns
Advanced persistence system with custom JSON serialization
History and data tracking via 'Anales' record system
Multi-platform deployment (JVM and WebAssembly)
Asynchronous asset management and state synchronization
